title: Iochroma gesnerioides

intro: Iochroma gesnerioides, also known as the purple flowered Iochroma, is a flowering plant species native to the Andes mountain range in South America. The plant has been traditionally used in folk medicine for its potential health benefits, including its anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antimicrobial properties, which may help to soothe digestive issues and reduce fever.
